moments.title: The Open Championship Live
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship is underway at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, with the world's best golfers competing for the coveted Claret Jug this weekend.

angles.name: Live Sport Action
angles.copy: Fore! The Open Championship is in full swing at Royal Birkdale. Who are you backing to lift the Claret Jug this weekend? #TheOpen

angles.name: Local Connection NW
angles.copy: All eyes on Southport! The Open Championship brings golf's elite to Royal Birkdale. Are you heading down to catch the action or watching from home?

angles.name: Devon Golf Fans
angles.copy: Big weekend for golf fans! The Open is live from Royal Birkdale. Any Devon pros making a run for the title, or just enjoying the spectacle?

moments.title: Kendal Calling Countdown
moments.blurb: The popular Kendal Calling festival returns to Lowther Deer Park in Cumbria from July 30th to August 2nd, featuring a diverse line-up of music and arts.

angles.name: Festival Excitement
angles.copy: Just two weeks until Kendal Calling kicks off! Who's ready to head to the fields for a weekend of incredible music and good vibes? #KendalCalling

angles.name: Line-up Tease
angles.copy: Kendal Calling is bringing the noise! Get ready for some epic rock and indie acts at Lowther Deer Park. Which bands are you most hyped to see?

moments.title: Camp Bestival Dorset Approaching
moments.blurb: The family-friendly Camp Bestival Dorset is set to transform Lulworth Castle from July 30th to August 2nd with music, comedy, and entertainment for all ages.

angles.name: Family Festival Fun
angles.copy: Who's packing their bags for Camp Bestival Dorset? Lulworth Castle is about to come alive with music and magic for the whole family! #CampBestival

angles.name: Music & Entertainment
angles.copy: From headline acts to kids' entertainment, Camp Bestival Dorset has it all. Get ready for an unforgettable weekend at Lulworth Castle!

moments.title: Brian May's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, will celebrate his 79th birthday on Sunday, July 19th.

angles.name: Guitar Hero Birthday
angles.copy: Rock royalty alert! This Sunday, Brian May turns 79. What's your favourite Queen guitar solo or track featuring his iconic Red Special?

angles.name: Queen's Legacy
angles.copy: Celebrating the man behind some of the greatest riffs ever recorded! Brian May of Queen turns 79 this weekend. Legend!

moments.title: Carlos Santana's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Mexican-American guitar icon Carlos Santana will turn 79 on Monday, July 20th, known for his unique blend of rock and Latin jazz.

angles.name: Latin Rock Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the incredible Carlos Santana on Monday! Which Santana track gets your soul grooving the most?

angles.name: Woodstock Icon
angles.copy: From Woodstock to global superstar, Carlos Santana turns 79 this week. His sound is timeless!

moments.title: Don Henley's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Eagles co-founder, drummer, and lead vocalist Don Henley celebrates his 79th birthday on Wednesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles Drummer Birthday
angles.copy: The voice behind 'Hotel California' turns 79 this Wednesday! Happy Birthday to Don Henley of The Eagles. What's your favourite Eagles classic?

angles.name: Solo & Band Hits
angles.copy: From The Eagles' harmonies to 'The Boys of Summer', Don Henley celebrates his 79th this week. A true music legend.

moments.title: George Clinton's 85th Birthday
moments.blurb: Funk music pioneer George Clinton, leader of Parliament-Funkadelic, will celebrate his 85th birthday on Wednesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Funk Master Birthday
angles.copy: Get up for the down stroke! The one and only George Clinton turns 85 this Wednesday. What's your favourite P-Funk anthem?

angles.name: Parliament-Funkadelic
angles.copy: Wishing a very funky 85th birthday to George Clinton on July 22nd! The mastermind behind Parliament-Funkadelic's iconic sound.

moments.title: Slash's 61st Birthday
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses' iconic lead guitarist, Slash, will celebrate his 61st birthday on Thursday, July 23rd.

angles.name: Guitar God Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 61st birthday to the top-hatted guitar god, Slash, this Thursday! Which Guns N' Roses solo is your all-time favourite?

angles.name: Guns N' Roses Legend
angles.copy: From 'Sweet Child o' Mine' to his signature riffs, Slash turns 61 on July 23rd. What a legend!

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez's 57th Birthday
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez, known as J.Lo, will celebrate her 57th birthday on Friday, July 24th.

angles.name: J.Lo's Big Day
angles.copy: Get ready to party for J.Lo's 57th birthday this Friday! What's your ultimate Jennifer Lopez dance track?

angles.name: Pop & Dance Icon
angles.copy: From 'Jenny from the Block' to 'On The Floor', Jennifer Lopez turns 57 on July 24th! Still bringing the heat!

moments.title: Mick Jagger's 83rd Birthday
moments.blurb: The Rolling Stones' legendary frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, will celebrate his 83rd birthday on Sunday, July 26th.

angles.name: Rock Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger turns 83 this Sunday? Still got the moves like Jagger! What's your favourite Stones song?

angles.name: Rolling Stones Forever
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young! Wishing a very happy birthday to the inimitable Mick Jagger on July 26th. A true rock and roll legend.

moments.title: Love Island UK Drama
moments.blurb: Love Island UK continues to dominate evening TV, with new arrivals and recouplings sparking fresh drama in the villa.

angles.name: Villa Gossip
angles.copy: Did you catch Love Island last night? The villa is heating up with all that new drama! Who are you rooting for?

angles.name: Recoupling Reactions
angles.copy: The latest Love Island recoupling has got everyone talking! Predict who's staying and who's getting dumped. #LoveIslandUK

moments.title: Sabrina Carpenter Tops UK Chart
moments.blurb: Sabrina Carpenter's latest single, 'Summer Crush', holds firm at number one on the Official UK Singles Chart for another week, solidifying its status as the song of the summer.

angles.name: Chart Dominator
angles.copy: Another week, another #1 for Sabrina Carpenter! 'Summer Crush' is officially the soundtrack to our lives right now. Can anything knock it off?

angles.name: Summer Anthem
angles.copy: That 'Summer Crush' feeling! Sabrina Carpenter is still owning the top spot on the Official UK Singles Chart. What's your favourite track from the album?
